title: euphrasia stricta subsp. tatarica
intro: Euphrasia stricta subsp. tatarica, also known as eyebright, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the gentian family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating eye and respiratory infections, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of eyebright include relieving symptoms of conjunctivitis, sinusitis, and allergies, as well as soothing digestive issues and reducing fever. Eyebright can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
